mapper.sql: id, meeting_code, meeting_name, meeting_date, meeting_place, participants, is_speech, meeting_phone, meeting_email, dept_id, note, proj_id, sub_user_id, sub_date, data_status, chk_result, chk_user_id, chk_date, chk_time, chk_view, speech_topic, reason_for_no_speech, office_rec_leave, hr_audit_leave, is_offic_ticket, sys_no, meeting_end_date, rely_unit, meeting_type, create_user_id, create_date, division_code, class, paper_name, report_name, intro, operate_time, file_ids, times_this_year, account_code, title, duty_desc, parttime_desc, expected_begin_date, expected_end_date, trvl_begin_date, trvl_end_date, other_position_desc, meeting_fee_amt, materials_fee_amt, hotel_fee_amt, traffic_fee_amt, other_fee_amt, fund_account, creator_name, check_status, rely_unit_name
mapper.update:
update srm_ac_meeting_manage
data_status = #{status},
chk_result = #{checkStatus},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select: SELECT samm.id as rowId, meeting_code as meetingCode, meeting_name as meetingName, meeting_date as meetingDate, meeting_place as meetingPlace, participants , is_speech as isSpeech, meeting_phone as meetingPhone, meeting_email as meetingEmail, dept_id as deptId, samm.note, proj_id as projId, sub_user_id as subUserId, sub_date as subDate, data_status as dataStatus, chk_result as chkResult, chk_user_id as chkUserId, chk_date as chkDate, chk_time as chkTime, chk_view as chkView, speech_topic as speechTopic, reason_for_no_speech as reasonForNoSpeech, office_rec_leave as officeRecLeave, hr_audit_leave as hrAuditLeave, is_offic_ticket as isOfficTicket, sys_no as sysNo, meeting_end_date as meetingEndDate, rely_unit as relyUnit, meeting_type as meetingType, create_user_id as createUserId, create_date as createDate, suser.name as creatorName, division_code as divisionCode, classCode, paper_name as paperName, report_name as reportName, intro, samm.operate_time as operateTime, file_ids as fileIds, times_this_year as timesThisYear, account_code as accountCode, samm.title, duty_desc as dutyDesc, parttime_desc as parttimeDesc, expected_begin_date as expectedBeginDate, expected_end_date as expectedEndDate, trvl_begin_date as trvlBeginDate, trvl_end_date as trvlEndDate, other_position_desc as otherPositionDesc,meeting_position as meetingPositionName, meeting_fee_amt as meetingFeeAmt, materials_fee_amt as materialsFeeAmt, hotel_fee_amt as hotelFeeAmt, traffic_fee_amt as trafficFeeAmt, other_fee_amt as otherFeeAmt, fund_account as fundAccount, samm.check_status as checkStatus, rely_unit_name as relyUnitName, csct.name as meetingTypeName,sclass.name as className FROM srm_ac_meeting_manage samm left join ct_srm_conference_type csct on is_valid=1 and samm.meeting_type =csct.code left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=samm.classCode left join ct_srm_user suser on suser.id=samm.create_user_id WHERE samm.id=#{RowId}

select samm.id as rowId,samm.meeting_code as meetingCode, meeting_name as meetingName,meeting_date as meetingDate, meeting_place as meetingPlace,participants,is_speech as isSpeech,meeting_phone as meetingPhone,meeting_email as meetingEmail ,samm.dept_id as deptId,csd.name as deptName ,samm.proj_id as projId,spi.name as projName ,samm.note,samm.data_status as dataStatus,samm.sys_no as sysNo,samm.trvl_begin_date as trvlBeginDate,samm.trvl_end_date as trvlEndDate ,samm.meeting_type,csct.name as meetingTypeName,samm.expected_begin_date as expectedBeginDate from srm_ac_meeting_manage samm left join srm_projects_info spi on samm.proj_id=spi.id left join ct_srm_dept csd on samm.dept_id=csd.id left join ct_srm_conference_type csct on samm.meeting_type =csct.code where samm.data_status=1
